Index JUIT Waknaghat Search Login Register x Home About Us About us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Alumni Services Member Benefits Request Forms Distinguished Alumni Alumni Achievements Alumni Awards Directory News and Updates News & Updates Alumni Stories Events Upcoming Events Past Events Gallery Albums Videos Engage Jobs/Internships Scholarship Contact Us Code of Ethics Home About Code of Ethics About Us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Code of Ethics / Conduct Maintain integrity in all transactions with the University. Treat our fellow alumina and faculty with respect, integrity, honesty, and fairness. Keep your tone respectful and polite in all written and verbal communication. It is, therefore, not permitted to negatively distinguish, mob or ridicule others. Consumption of alcohol, drugs and smoking in the Institute’s premises is strictly prohibited. In case of any damage to the Institute’s property, members of the alumni committee will be dealt according to the rules & regulations of the Institute. Foster team spirit, leadership and synergy. Do not post any content that defames, abuses, or threatens others or is illegal. About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
